allow: PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Write-Output "Stopping dev server PID $p"; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } else { Write-Output "No server on 3000" }; if \(Test-Path .next\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output ".next cache cleared" })
